current_plan.description: Build topical authority in AI x Finance Operations through twice-daily publishing targeting high-intent finance executives; instrumentation fix (GA4 numeric property ID + GSC permissions) is prerequisite for data-driven evaluation.
long_tail_keywords: how AI is changing investment banking 2026
current_plan.rationale: Strategy launched 2026-03-22 — only 2 days old, well within the 5-day minimum evaluation window. GA4 property ID error (G-PQGD25NQ79 requires numeric ID) and GSC 403 permission error persist, yielding zero performance data. Bing shows no query or page data yet, consistent with a brand-new site. Google Trends returned 404 again. Tavily confirms the AI-in-finance-operations pillar remains highly competitive and well-trafficked by Finastra, InData Labs, BizTech, and Keyrus — validating our niche. No data exists to justify an ADJUST or NEW decision.

decision_history.rationale: The strategy launched 2026-03-22, making it only 1 day old — well within the 5-day minimum evaluation window. GA4 and GSC data are unavailable due to a misconfigured IAM credentials API (503/403 errors), so no performance data can be assessed. Google Trends also returned a 404. Tavily confirms strong competitor activity in AI-in-finance content, validating the chosen pillar. Strategy must be held until instrumentation is restored and real data flows.
